title: SB 1120 protects patients from Artificial Intelligence by requiring health care providers to make the final decisions on what kind of treatments patients receive rather than AI
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 1120 protects patients from Artificial Intelligence by requiring health care providers to make the final decisions on what kind of treatments patients receive.",
    "Artificial intelligence is an important and increasingly utilized tool in diagnosing and treating patients.",
    "Algorithms do not fully know and understand a patient's medical history and needs, which can lead to erroneous or biased decisions on medical treatment.",
    "Health insurance plans have increasingly relied on AI to streamline the processing of claims and prior authorization requests.",
    "The reliance on AI in health insurance can lead to inaccuracies and biases.",
    "Wrongful denial of insurance claims based on algorithms can lead to serious health consequences and even death.",
    "Leading healthcare organizations have called for oversight over the use of AI in insurance.",
    "The Physicians Make Decisions Act ensures that a denial, delay, or modification of health care services based on medical necessity be made by a licensed physician or other health care provider competent to evaluate the specific clinical issues of the case.",
    "SB 1120 commits companies that use AI in their utilization review process to fair and equitable standards."
  ]
}
```
